subject: Cedar & Slate launch scope confirmation
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Elise,

We can include daily batch reconciliation for launch and confirm the real-time payment reconciliation scope after product review. Daily inventory batch sync remains targeted for June 2, and the executive launch readiness dashboard is targeted for June 5.

Best,
Mira

intendedClaims.text: We can include daily batch reconciliation for launch and confirm the real-time payment reconciliation scope after product review.
Daily inventory batch sync remains targeted for June 2.
